name: Tetrazzini
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare noodles according to package directions.
2. Saute peppers, onions, and mushrooms in butter.
3. Add cornstarch, salt, and pepper; then add chicken broth all at once; add dry milk.
4. Cook until thick and bubbly.
5. Combine meat and cheese; add to sauce.
6. Turn into 1 1/2 quart casserole.
7. Bake until cheese melts (about 15 minutes).
8. Serve over noodles. Bake in oven at 350 degrees.
